headlines.title: 'Cat in the Hat' participates in 250th celebrations to promote new Seuss book
headlines.description: NBC News speaks to the "Cat in the Hat' ahead of the release of a new Dr. Seuss book as crowds gathered in Manhattan to mark America's 250th and celebrate with the iconic children's character.

headlines.title: Masked group of men seen marching and chanting outside D.C.’s Union Station
headlines.description: Video captured the moments that masked men were seen marching and chanting outside of Union Station in Washington, D.C. Members of the white supremacist group Patriot Front had been seen riding the Washington Metro.

headlines.title: Sights and sounds from Sail4th 250 marking America's 250
headlines.description: Watch scenes from Sail4th 250, the special event in New York Harbor marking America's 250th birthday with an array of ships, vessels and aircrafts.

headlines.title: Mamdani, Hochul and Sherrill mark America's 250 at Sail4th 250
headlines.description: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani and Governors Kathy Hochul and Mikie Sherrill from New York and New Jersey spoke with NBC News' Laura Jarrett about what it feels like to mark America's 250th birthday in New York Harbor.

headlines.title: Paralyzed at 7, she fought for the life she wanted. Medicaid cuts threaten to take it away.
headlines.description: For a half-century, U.S. policy has pushed to keep disabled Americans out of institutions. Now Rebecca Anger and others fear that era could end.

headlines.title: The best Fourth of July sales to shop right now
headlines.description: The best 4th of July sales are happening now. Our editors found worthwhile deals on Apple, Yeti, Medicube and more.

headlines.title: These 41+ Amazon July 4th deals feel like Prime Day just got extended
headlines.description: Amazon’s 4th of July deals are live after Prime Day, including discounts on Yeti, Kitchenaid, Shark and more.

headlines.title: 28+ REI 4th of July sales worth shopping before the deals are gone
headlines.description: REI’s 4th of July sale includes discounts on Hoka, Patagonia, Smartwool and more. Here are the best deals to shop.

headlines.title: Dick’s Sporting Goods’ 4th of July sale is the perfect time to buy those sneakers you’ve been wanting
headlines.description: Dick’s Sporting Goods’ 4th of July sale is a good time to shop Hoka, Owala, Stanley and Adidas. Here are the best deals.

headlines.title: As the nation turns 250, many Americans say flying the Stars and Stripes is now a red flag
headlines.description: The American flag can have many meanings, whether hung on front porches or waved in parades and protests. To some, it’s also tied up with President Trump.

headlines.title: America at 250 is riven with doubt and pessimism — but with glimmers of hope
headlines.description: Americans have a bleak outlook on the nation’s future ahead of its 250th birthday next month, with most saying the U.S. has already seen its best days and a record-low number saying they are extremely proud to be Americans, according to a new NBC News poll

headlines.title: Great American State Fair attendees say they haven’t noticed politics overshadowing the event
headlines.description: Trump kicked off the event with a headlining speech Wednesday after musical acts dropped out of the lineup citing concerns over partisanship.
